proposed_hypotheses.text: A one-unit increase in `feature_044` is associated with higher mean `pfs_months` in the full cohort.

analyses.code: Full multivariable OLS: pfs_months ~ all feature_*; coefficient for feature_044.
analyses.result_summary: Full multivariable OLS estimated +0.176 months of PFS per one-unit increase in feature_044 (univariable slope +0.176).

proposed_hypotheses.text: A one-level increase in ordinal `feature_027` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Level means and full multivariable OLS coefficient for feature_027.
analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS declined across feature_027 levels 0, 1, and 2 (0: 5.640, 1: 4.444, 2: 3.289 months); adjusted slope -1.172 months per level.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_039` equal to 1 is associated with lower mean `pfs_months` than `feature_039` equal to 0.

analyses.code: Welch mean comparison and full multivariable OLS coefficient for feature_039.
analyses.result_summary: Patients with feature_039=1 had mean PFS 3.617 months vs 5.153 months for feature_039=0; adjusted difference -1.549 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_046` equal to 1 is associated with higher mean `pfs_months` than `feature_046` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: Patients with feature_046=1 had mean PFS 5.408 months vs 4.310 months for feature_046=0; adjusted difference +1.101 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_010` equal to 1 remains associated with higher mean `pfs_months` than `feature_010` equal to 0 after adjustment for all other features.

analyses.code: Welch mean comparison followed by full multivariable OLS coefficient for feature_010.
analyses.result_summary: The unadjusted difference was +0.362 months, but the full adjusted difference was only +0.014 months and was not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_031` attenuates the positive association between `feature_046` equal to 1 and `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Full main-effect OLS plus interaction term feature_046:feature_031; effect is the interaction coefficient.
analyses.result_summary: Adding feature_046:feature_031 to the full main-effect model gave an interaction coefficient of -1.6653 months.

analyses.result_summary: Adding feature_046:feature_069 to the full main-effect model gave an interaction coefficient of 1.5594 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_027` weakens the positive association between higher `feature_044` and `pfs_months`.
`feature_015` equal to 1 weakens the positive association between higher `feature_044` and `pfs_months`.
`feature_040` equal to 1 makes the negative association between higher `feature_062` and `pfs_months` stronger.

analyses.code: Full main-effect OLS plus interaction term feature_044:feature_027.
analyses.result_summary: Adding feature_044:feature_027 to the full main-effect model gave an interaction coefficient of -0.0063 months.

analyses.code: Full main-effect OLS plus interaction term feature_044:feature_015.
analyses.result_summary: Adding feature_044:feature_015 to the full main-effect model gave an interaction coefficient of -0.0063 months.

analyses.code: Full main-effect OLS plus interaction term feature_040:feature_062.
analyses.result_summary: Adding feature_040:feature_062 to the full main-effect model gave an interaction coefficient of -0.0010 months; this was not significant.
